you_are_here: Phase 3 of 7 — Awaiting client inputs to unlock the build

phases.name: Scoping & Diagnosis
phases.title: Engagement scoping & problem diagnosis
phases.desc: Structured strategy session with Shalini Gupta. Problem diagnosed: Ishwa's quality edge lives entirely in consultant judgement — no documented framework, no structured AI input. Solution architecture defined across three layers.

phases.name: Data Audit
phases.title: Data receipt, audit & documentation
phases.desc: Five data files received from Ishwa (Zoho Recruit + CRM, covering Sep 2022 — Mar 2026). Full audit completed. Three structural gaps identified. Audit documents, data capture templates, interactive forms, and the ChatGPT Search Assistant built and delivered.

milestone.label: All audit documents, templates and meeting prep delivered

phases.name: Client Inputs
phases.title: Pending inputs from Ishwa — the build blockers
phases.desc: Three specific inputs are required before the matching engine prototype can be built. Items 1 and 2 can be covered in a single 60–90 minute session with a senior consultant.

deliverables.label: Data capture method selected (A / B / C)

phases.blocker: All three items are pending from Ishwa. Wednesday 9 April meeting is the unlock session.

phases.name: Rubric Build
phases.title: Evaluation rubric — externalise consultant judgement
phases.desc: The walkthrough session is converted by Claude into a weighted JSON scoring rubric. Criteria names, weights, positive and negative signals, and dealbreaker flags are documented per mandate type. Reviewed and signed off by a senior consultant.
phases.blocker: Requires: walkthrough session and profile evaluation from Phase 3.

phases.name: Engine Build
phases.title: Matching engine prototype — build & validation
phases.desc: Claude API deployment. Takes a structured mandate JSON and a long-list of candidate profiles (50–150), returns a ranked shortlist with per-criterion scores and plain-language rationale per candidate. Tested against recent closed mandates to validate output quality before handover.
phases.blocker: Requires: evaluation rubric from Phase 4. Estimated build time: 2–3 weeks from rubric receipt.

phases.name: Data Capture
phases.title: Data capture tool — selected, built & deployed
phases.desc: Whichever method Ishwa selects — ChatGPT persona prompt, WhatsApp bot, or lightweight web app — the data capture layer is built and deployed. Consultants begin logging the four key data points per mandate that make the engine self-improving over time.

milestone.label: First mandate logged through new system

phases.name: BD Analytics
phases.title: BD pattern analysis — strategic intelligence layer
phases.desc: Pattern analysis across 3+ years of mandate data. Close rates by sector, average search duration by mandate type, ghost client signals, BD pipeline conversion. Delivered as a strategic insight report for leadership — the layer that tells Ishwa which mandates to pursue and which to push back on.

milestone.label: BD analytics report delivered to Ishwa leadership
